src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Add Javadoc comment block to the main application class to attribute authorship.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Added /** @Autor Nidhal Naffati */ before the class declaration.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.general_idea: Adjust indentation of the main method to use spaces instead of tabs for consistent code style.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/CarRen.human_impl: Changed indentation from tabs to 4 spaces for the main method body.

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Replace javax.persistence imports with jakarta.persistence to comply with Jakarta EE 9+ namespace requirements in Spring Boot 3.
Add Hibernate validation annotations to enforce data integrity rules on entity fields.
Enforce non-nullability on primitive wrapper fields using Jakarta validation annotations.
Switch from auto-increment to sequence-based ID generation for better database compatibility and control.
Define explicit column constraints such as uniqueness and nullability for the registration number.
src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.human_impl: @Column(unique = true, nullable = false) private int registrationNumber;

src/main/java/com/CarRentalAgency/entity.general_idea: Replace free-text string fields with typed enums for model, gear, and fuel to ensure data consistency.
Establish a ManyToOne relationship with the Dealer entity and configure JSON serialization to prevent infinite recursion.
Enable the Builder pattern for the entity class to facilitate object construction.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.4 to 3.2.1 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Update the target Java version property from 17 to 21.
Replace the legacy MySQL connector artifact with the new group ID and artifact ID required for Spring Boot 3.
Add spring-boot-starter-validation to replace the manual jakarta.validation-api dependency.
Remove the Thymeleaf starter dependency as it is no longer needed.
Add Jackson JSR310 datatype support for Java 8+ date/time API serialization.
Add Flyway MySQL dependency for database migration support.
Add Spring Boot Mail starter dependency for email functionality.
Explicitly add JUnit 4 dependency, likely for legacy test compatibility.
Add Spring Context Support dependency explicitly.
Add JUnit Jupiter dependency for modern JUnit 5 testing.
Add Flyway Maven plugin to the build configuration.
Update the project version string from 0.0.1-SNAPSHOT to 1.02.02.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Updated the database connection URL to use a cleaner schema name and removed legacy JDBC parameters.
Removed unnecessary quotes from the database password configuration.
Changed Hibernate DDL auto strategy from 'update' to 'validate' to enforce schema consistency with migrations.
Switched Hibernate dialect from MySQL8Dialect to the generic MySQLDialect.
Enabled SQL formatting in Hibernate properties for better readability in logs.
Removed Thymeleaf configuration block as it is no longer used or required.
Added Flyway configuration to manage database migrations explicitly.
Configured the server to exclude stack traces from error responses for security and cleanliness.
